sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value) VALUES (1, 'test value'), (2, NULL), (3, '');
SELECT connection_get('var_demo') AS retrieved, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL) AS non_null_count;
SELECT id, value FROM test_table WHERE connection_get('var_demo') IS NULL OR value = connection_get('var_demo');
SELECT id, value, connection_get('var_demo') FROM test_table WHERE isLiteral(value) OR value = '';
SELECT id, COUNT(value) AS value_count FROM test_table GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(value) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE isLiteral(value));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value) SELECT id, connection_get('var_demo') FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, AVG(LENGTH(value)) OVER (PARTITION BY connection_get('var_demo')) AS avg_length FROM test_table;
SELECT id, connection_get('var_demo'), CASE WHEN value IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS value_flag FROM test_table;
UPDATE test_table SET value = CASE WHEN connection_get('var_demo') IS NULL THEN 'default value' ELSE connection_get('var_demo') END WHERE isLiteral(value);
